auth_session.table: DEFINE TABLE auth_session TYPE NORMAL SCHEMAFULL PERMISSIONS NONE

fields.created_ip_digest: DEFINE FIELD created_ip_digest ON auth_session TYPE none | string ASSERT $value = NONE OR string::len($value) = 43 PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.expires_at: DEFINE FIELD expires_at ON auth_session TYPE datetime PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.issued_at: DEFINE FIELD issued_at ON auth_session TYPE datetime PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.jti_digest: DEFINE FIELD jti_digest ON auth_session TYPE string PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.last_seen_at: DEFINE FIELD last_seen_at ON auth_session TYPE none | datetime PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.revoked_at: DEFINE FIELD revoked_at ON auth_session TYPE none | datetime PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.user: DEFINE FIELD user ON auth_session TYPE record<user> PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.user_agent_summary: DEFINE FIELD user_agent_summary ON auth_session TYPE none | string ASSERT $value = NONE OR string::len($value) <= 256 AND !$value.contains('\\n') AND !$value.contains('\\r') PERMISSIONS FULL

indexes.auth_session_expires_at: DEFINE INDEX auth_session_expires_at ON auth_session FIELDS expires_at
indexes.auth_session_jti_unique: DEFINE INDEX auth_session_jti_unique ON auth_session FIELDS jti_digest UNIQUE
indexes.auth_session_user: DEFINE INDEX auth_session_user ON auth_session FIELDS user

login_throttle.table: DEFINE TABLE login_throttle TYPE NORMAL SCHEMAFULL PERMISSIONS NONE

fields.blocked_until: DEFINE FIELD blocked_until ON login_throttle TYPE none | datetime PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.failed_attempts: DEFINE FIELD failed_attempts ON login_throttle TYPE int DEFAULT 0 PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.identifier_digest: DEFINE FIELD identifier_digest ON login_throttle TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) = 43 PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.network_digest: DEFINE FIELD network_digest ON login_throttle TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) = 43 PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.window_started_at: DEFINE FIELD window_started_at ON login_throttle TYPE datetime PERMISSIONS FULL

indexes.login_throttle_blocked_until: DEFINE INDEX login_throttle_blocked_until ON login_throttle FIELDS blocked_until
indexes.login_throttle_key_unique: DEFINE INDEX login_throttle_key_unique ON login_throttle FIELDS identifier_digest, network_digest UNIQUE

user.table: DEFINE TABLE user TYPE NORMAL SCHEMAFULL PERMISSIONS NONE

fields.active: DEFINE FIELD active ON user TYPE bool DEFAULT true PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.created_at: DEFINE FIELD created_at ON user TYPE datetime DEFAULT time::now() READONLY PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.display_name: DEFINE FIELD display_name ON user TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) > 0 AND string::len($value) <= 120 PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.email: DEFINE FIELD email ON user TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) > 0 AND string::len($value) <= 254 PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.email_normalized: DEFINE FIELD email_normalized ON user TYPE string ASSERT string::len($value) > 0 AND string::len($value) <= 254 PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.password_hash: DEFINE FIELD password_hash ON user TYPE string ASSERT string::starts_with($value, '$argon2id$') PERMISSIONS FULL
fields.updated_at: DEFINE FIELD updated_at ON user TYPE datetime DEFAULT ALWAYS time::now() PERMISSIONS FULL

indexes.user_email_normalized_unique: DEFINE INDEX user_email_normalized_unique ON user FIELDS email_normalized UNIQUE
